answer: The data layer is built on Prisma ORM using a single 'Quotes' model (id, quote, createdAt). It is designed to work with Prisma Accelerate, as evidenced by the requirement to use an Accelerate connection string for the DATABASE_URL and the use of 'force-dynamic' in the root page to avoid stale data. The API route provides the interface to interact with this data, and types are centrally managed in lib/types/index.ts.
caveat: The analysis focuses on the data schema and configuration; the specific implementation details within the API route handling the database queries are referenced in the README but the actual code for app/api/route.ts was not provided in the snippets.
